title: Anthropic Documentation
prompt_source: Inline docs prompt; CONNECTOR_DOCUMENTATION_GUIDELINES fetched via getDocGuidelines()

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
**Anthropic** is the maker of the Claude family of large language models, exposing a JSON REST API under `https://api.anthropic.com/v1`. This connector ÔÇö `AnthropicConnector` (`CONNECTOR_TYPE = "anthropic"`, `AUTH_TYPE = "api_key"`) ÔÇö wraps the operational surfaces a Shielva tenant typically needs from Anthropic:

| Surface | Base path | Capability |
|---|---|---|
| Messages | `/messages` | Create Claude chat completions |
| Token counting | `/messages/count_tokens` | Estimate input-token cost before sending |
| Models | `/models` | List + read available models for the API key |
| Message Batches | `/messages/batches` | Submit / cancel / poll async batch inference jobs |
| Files (beta) | `/files` | Upload / list / get / delete user files (anthropic-beta gated) |

The connector treats Anthropic as an inference surface, not a document source ÔÇö `sync()` returns a zero-document `SyncResult`. All public methods are standalone `async def` (OCP), every HTTP call goes through `client/http_client.py::AnthropicHTTPClient` (SOC), and retries are handled with exponential backoff + `Retry-After` honouring (3 attempts on 429 / 5xx).

sections.title: Quick Start
sections.content:
### 1. Create an Anthropic API key

1. Sign in to https://console.anthropic.com.
2. Open **Settings Ôćĺ API Keys**.
3. Click **Create Key**, name it (e.g. `shielva-prod`).
4. Copy the `sk-ant-...` value ÔÇö Anthropic shows the secret only once.
5. (Optional) Note the date-pinned API version you want to target (default `2023-06-01`).

### 2. Install in ACP

In **ACP Ôćĺ Manage Connectors Ôćĺ Anthropic**, fill in:

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| `api_key` (secret) | The `sk-ant-...` value from step 4 |
| `base_url` (text, optional) | Override `https://api.anthropic.com/v1` for a proxy |
| `anthropic_version` (text, optional) | Pin a specific date version (default `2023-06-01`) |
| `timeout_s` (number, optional) | Per-request httpx timeout (default 60) |
| `rate_limit_per_min` (number, optional) | Client-side soft cap (default 50) |

Click **Install**. `install()` validates `api_key` is present (it does NOT call the API), initialises the `AnthropicHTTPClient`, and returns `ConnectorStatus(HEALTHY, AUTHENTICATED)`.

### 3. First health check

The gateway calls `health_check()` which lists 1 model (`GET /models?limit=1`) as a token-free probe. On 2xx Ôćĺ `HEALTHY + CONNECTED`. On 401 Ôćĺ `OFFLINE + TOKEN_EXPIRED`. On 403 Ôćĺ `UNHEALTHY + INVALID_CREDENTIALS`. On 5xx Ôćĺ `DEGRADED + CONNECTED` with a structured-log warning.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content:
The Anthropic REST API uses **server-to-server API key authentication** (`AUTH_TYPE = "api_key"`). No OAuth dance, no token refresh, no expiry.

### Credential model

- `api_key` is sent in the `x-api-key` header (NOT `Authorization`, NOT `Bearer`).
- `anthropic-version: 2023-06-01` is mandatory on every request and is sent automatically by `AnthropicHTTPClient`.
- File API endpoints (`/files/*`) additionally require `anthropic-beta: files-api-2025-04-14`; the client adds this only on those calls.

### Lifecycle

| Phase | Behaviour |
|---|---|
| `install()` | Validates `api_key`. Initialises `AnthropicHTTPClient`. Does **not** call any Anthropic endpoint. |
| `authorize(...)` | Returns `TokenInfo(access_token=api_key, token_type="api_key")` ÔÇö there is no token exchange. |
| `health_check()` | `GET /models?limit=1` ÔÇö minimal, token-free probe. |
| `ensure_token()` | Not called ÔÇö no token to refresh. |
| token storage | None. |

### Header contract

Every outbound request:

```
x-api-key:         <api_key>           ÔćÉ raw key, no Bearer prefix
anthropic-version: 2023-06-01           ÔćÉ mandatory
content-type:      application/json
anthropic-beta:    files-api-2025-04-14 ÔćÉ only on /files calls
```

sections.title: Configuration
sections.content:
### Install fields (per-tenant)

Read via `self.config.get(...)` in `connector.py::__init__` ÔÇö never hardcoded.

| Key | Type | Required | Read in code | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `api_key` | secret | yes | `self.api_key` | `x-api-key` header value |
| `base_url` | text | no | `self.base_url` (default `https://api.anthropic.com/v1`) | Override for proxy / staging |
| `anthropic_version` | text | no | `self.anthropic_version` (default `2023-06-01`) | Pins API surface contract |
| `timeout_s` | number | no | `self.timeout_s` (default 60) | Per-request httpx timeout |
| `rate_limit_per_min` | number | no | `self.rate_limit_per_min` (default 50) | Client-side soft cap |

### Class constants (provider-wide)

```python
REQUIRED_CONFIG_KEYS = ["api_key"]
_STATUS_MAP = {
    401: ("OFFLINE",   "TOKEN_EXPIRED"),
    403: ("UNHEALTHY", "INVALID_CREDENTIALS"),
    429: ("DEGRADED",  "CONNECTED"),
}
_ANTHROPIC_BASE = "https://api.anthropic.com/v1"
_DEFAULT_ANTHROPIC_VERSION = "2023-06-01"
```

sections.title: API Methods
sections.content: All public async methods on `AnthropicConnector`. SOC: `connector.py` orchestrates only; HTTP lives in `client/http_client.py::AnthropicHTTPClient`.

children.title: Lifecycle
children.content:
### `async install() -> ConnectorStatus`
Validate `api_key`; initialise `AnthropicHTTPClient`. Does NOT call the API.

### `async authorize(auth_code, state) -> TokenInfo`
No-op for api_key auth ÔÇö returns `TokenInfo(access_token=api_key, token_type="api_key")`.

### `async health_check() -> ConnectorStatus`
Lists 1 model via `GET /models?limit=1`. Classifies failures by `_STATUS_MAP`.

### `async sync(since=None, full=False, kb_id=None, webhook_url=None) -> SyncResult`
Documented no-op. Anthropic is an inference API, not a document source. Returns `SyncResult(COMPLETED, 0/0/0)`.

### Webhook overrides
- `handle_webhook(...)`, `process_callback(...)`, `handle_event(...)`, `batch_processor(...)` ÔÇö all documented no-ops. Anthropic has no provider-pushed webhooks today; these are kept so the BaseConnector ABI is honoured.

children.title: Messages
children.content:
### `async create_message(model, messages, max_tokens=1024, system=None, temperature=1.0, stream=False) -> Dict`
`POST /messages` ÔÇö body: `{model, messages, max_tokens, system?, temperature, stream}`. Returns the raw Anthropic response dict.

### `async count_tokens(model, messages, system=None) -> Dict`
`POST /messages/count_tokens` ÔÇö body: `{model, messages, system?}`. Returns `{input_tokens: int}`.

children.title: Models
children.content:
### `async list_models(limit=20, before_id=None, after_id=None) -> Dict`
`GET /models?limit={N}&before_id=...&after_id=...` ÔÇö cursor pagination.

### `async get_model(model_id) -> Dict`
`GET /models/{model_id}` ÔÇö fetch a single model.

children.title: Message Batches
children.content:
### `async create_batch(requests) -> Dict`
`POST /messages/batches` ÔÇö body: `{requests: [{custom_id, params}, ...]}`. Submit an async batch job.

### `async get_batch(batch_id) -> Dict`
`GET /messages/batches/{batch_id}` ÔÇö batch status.

### `async list_batches(limit=20, before_id=None, after_id=None) -> Dict`
`GET /messages/batches` ÔÇö list all batches.

### `async cancel_batch(batch_id) -> Dict`
`POST /messages/batches/{batch_id}/cancel` ÔÇö cancel an in-flight batch.

### `async get_batch_results(batch_id) -> Dict`
`GET /messages/batches/{batch_id}/results` ÔÇö JSONL results; the connector returns the parsed dict or `{raw: text}` when the response is line-delimited JSON.

children.title: Files (beta)
children.content:
### `async list_files(limit=20, before_id=None, after_id=None) -> Dict`
`GET /files` ÔÇö list uploaded files. Sends `anthropic-beta: files-api-2025-04-14`.

### `async get_file(file_id) -> Dict`
`GET /files/{file_id}` ÔÇö file metadata.

### `async delete_file(file_id) -> Dict`
`DELETE /files/{file_id}` ÔÇö delete a file.

sections.title: Error Handling
sections.content:
Exception hierarchy in `exceptions.py`:

```
AnthropicError                              # base; carries status_code + response_body
ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ AnthropicAuthError                      # 401 / 403
ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ AnthropicBadRequestError                # 400 / 413
ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ AnthropicNotFoundError                  # 404
ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ AnthropicRateLimitError                 # 429 ÔÇö retry_after_s
ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ AnthropicServerError                    # 5xx / 529 overloaded_error
ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ AnthropicNetworkError                   # transport-layer (DNS / TCP / TLS / timeout)
```

Back-compat alias preserved:
```
AnthropicNotFound = AnthropicNotFoundError
```

### Retry behaviour (`client/http_client.py::_request`)

| Status | Action |
|---|---|
| 400 / 401 / 403 / 404 | Raise immediately |
| 429 | Honour `Retry-After` header when present, else exponential backoff `_BACKOFF_BASE * 2 ** attempt + jitter`, capped at 30s, up to `_MAX_RETRIES=3` |
| 5xx / 529 | Same exponential backoff, retry up to 3 |
| `httpx.TimeoutException` / `httpx.NetworkError` | Backoff, retry up to 3, then raise `AnthropicNetworkError` |

### How errors surface to the gateway

`health_check()` catches exceptions and maps them:

```
401 Ôćĺ ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE,   TOKEN_EXPIRED)
403 Ôćĺ ConnectorStatus(UNHEALTHY, INVALID_CREDENTIALS)
5xx Ôćĺ ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED,  CONNECTED)     ÔÇö logged as warning
network Ôćĺ ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, CONNECTED)
```

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.content:
| Symptom | Probable cause | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, MISSING_CREDENTIALS)` at install | `api_key` blank | Paste the `sk-ant-...` value into the install field. Anthropic shows the key only once ÔÇö rotate if lost. |
| `ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, TOKEN_EXPIRED)` at health_check | 401 ÔÇö key revoked or wrong account | Generate a fresh key in Console Ôćĺ API Keys. Update the install field. |
| `ConnectorStatus(UNHEALTHY, INVALID_CREDENTIALS)` at health_check | 403 ÔÇö organisation disabled / billing suspended / scope blocked | Check Console Ôćĺ Settings Ôćĺ Billing. Verify the key's organisation has the Messages API enabled. |
| `anthropic.http.retry` warnings spike | Hitting 429 (per-minute / per-day rate cap) | Honoured `Retry-After` automatically. Lower `rate_limit_per_min` or upgrade the Anthropic tier. |
| `AnthropicNotFoundError` on `get_model(...)` | Model id is deprecated or not exposed to this tier | List available ids first with `list_models(limit=50)`. |
| `AnthropicBadRequestError` on `create_message` | `max_tokens` too large or messages role alternation invalid | Halve `max_tokens`. Ensure every `user` message is followed by an `assistant` reply (or the next `user`). |
| `anthropic-version` header missing | Hand-rolled client bypass | Always use `connector.create_message(...)`; the header is owned by `AnthropicHTTPClient._headers()`. |
| File API returns 404 | Beta header missing | `list_files / get_file / delete_file` already send `anthropic-beta: files-api-2025-04-14`. Confirm the file id is correct. |
